Defaults

Farm location (weather fallback)

Used for the weather button when GPS isn't available. The full US ZIP directory is built into this file, so the lookup is instant and needs no internet.

Connection check

Tests whether this device can reach each service the app depends on, and whether your saves are actually reaching the cloud. Run this if weather fails or you suspect records aren't syncing.

Import old records

Choose a JSON backup from your previous SprayLog app (or a backup made here). You'll see a preview before anything is written. Records that already exist are skipped, never overwritten.

Backup

Downloads everything (records, fields, products, mixes, settings) as one JSON file. Same format the importer reads. Good habit: back up after big spray days.
